{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203492512B42BDC9038F41232F7"}"},"total":1927},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7437079190694495000","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗷嗷嗷，太好看了，这简直就是我的梦中情书啊，完全契合我人生理想的小说[捂脸]我就喜欢看这种实际是凡人，结果被认成大佬还不被识破的小说，当然必须合理，过于离谱就没意思了，但是作者写的很好，哈哈哈，真的一边看一边笑，本来不好的心情都变好了，作者一天百更啊，让我一次看个过瘾[奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731583681,"group_id":"7425058199205596222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0QNtbIswNZgbg0wMquPOS8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d30b784daebc41b4aff52e01b4544038~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707648&x-signature=wlH%2By4vpPdO1UD%2B8izk%2FXJ4q6F8%3D","user_id":"110817354458","user_name":"崩崩小圆猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110817354458","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425058199205596222","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻+迪化+轻系统+反套路+搞笑轻松】
我叫林凡，我现在很急，没修为，没计谋，没人脉的我忽然被当成了圣地老祖，背负人类存亡，这剧情有点不对劲吧！
“不愧是老祖，我等果然无法看破您的修为！”
那是因为我特么根本就没有修为！
“老祖神机妙算，再次重创魔族，为我人类夺得一线生机！”
我只是去上了个厕所，谁能告诉我魔族为什么会被重创啊！
“不错，老祖的谋算，我等已经全部明白了！”
你又明白什么了？我自己什么都不明白！
我发现，无论我干点什么，手下人总会莫名其妙的理解出其他的东西，但是谁能告诉我为什么魔族已经快要被灭掉了啊？！
呵呵，这该死的发展，貌似还不错？
这是我的功劳吧......应该勉强算我的功劳吧？
（本书已完结，不烂尾，不太监，可放心入坑！）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/84f44dde6f7f4ad8c02040d879f2ea0b","author":"银色誓言","author_id":"","book_id":"7425058199205596222","book_name":"说了没修为，可他们老说我无敌","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c8d0d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7425058616022942270","read_count":"56670","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1301922"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"634","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,搞笑轻松,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/154560d88224f7a4c021245b6ea88c87~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779306565&x-signature=vMJNmO80Q8whBQ1kpK3L9dIWITE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1050762388453799","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"75"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203492512B42BDC9038F41232F7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":52,"forwarded_count":0,"lis sten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21660,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":40451},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7524721175287055166","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在番茄看了这么多本书，这是我除了戏神，除了葫芦写的书之外最喜欢看的书了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751990903,"group_id":"7425058199205596222","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"193968197862651"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425058199205596222","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"788"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读22小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":80454,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7476451711717573438","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实不错，很有逻辑的搞笑文
众所周知搞笑文很好些，但是逻辑严谨的搞笑文就没那么难写
这个故事里每个人物也并不想其他爽文里那么无脑，每个人也有属于自己的经历和魅力
而且这个脑补流很难些，稍微逻辑差点，就显得很出戏
但故事中所有的脑补的逻辑都非常的完美，让人找不出缺点
这作者很有实力，大家可以看下
蛮搞笑的
而且剧中也没有什么脏话和擦边吸引眼球
纯搞笑加脑补，世界观也很完善，不错不错，非常好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740750793,"group_id":"7425058199205596222","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+/acEh4Gf0BP+kxuxHZPKk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/user-avatar/b2920a9bf31bbb438098f083f828da64~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710690&x-signature=aHt8%2FvZsYwgeKM8mKnGOc3RcM4c%3D","user_id":"193968197862651","user_name":"socxtdu"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"193968197862651","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1772186904,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7425058199205596222","book_info":{"abstract":"【玄幻+迪化+轻系统+反套路+搞笑轻松】
